zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Pomeroy於大約1168年出生在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易時，他的父親Henry de la Pomeraie23歲，母親Matilda (Maud) de Vitre24歲。他於大約1199年與Alicia de Vere結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1207年在英國英格蘭戴文斯托克 加布里埃爾享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Pomeroy was born about 1168, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de la Pomeraie, was 23 and his mother, Matilda (Maud) de Vitre, was 24. He married Alicia de Vere about 1199. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1207, in Stoke Gabriel, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Pomeroy est né environ 1168, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de la Pomeraie, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Matilda (Maud) de Vitre, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alicia de Vere environ 1199. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1207, à Stoke Gabriel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Pomeroyが約1168年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで生まれた時，父Henry de la Pomeraieは23歳，母Matilda (Maud) de Vitreは24歳であった。約1199年にAlicia de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1207年にイギリスイギリスデボンストク ガブリールで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Pomeroy(이)가 대략 1168년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de la Pomeraie(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda (Maud) de Vitre(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1199년 Alicia de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1207년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토크 게이브리얼에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Pomeroy родился около 1168 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de la Pomeraie было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda (Maud) de Vitre, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia de Vere около 1199 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1207 г. в местности сток габриел, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
